tool.name: CrewAI
tool.description: Open source multi-agent framework focused on autonomous teams and task coordination.
tool.logoNotes: Official CrewAI primary logo asset from the CrewAI brand resource center (`Logo.svg`).
tool.practitionerNote: Good for fast multi-agent prototypes, but larger regulated deployments usually need extra guardrails around observability, change control, and execution boundaries.

dataResidency.detail: Self-hosted library; data residency is fully operator-controlled.

deployment.detail: pip-installed OSS framework; runs on operator infrastructure (managed cloud sold separately).

auditLogging.detail: No built-in audit subsystem; operators add logging via standard tooling/integrations.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; SOC 2 applies to the operator's infrastructure, not the package.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 27001 applies to the operator's ISMS, not the package.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 42001 applies to the deploying organisation.

euAiAct.detail: Developer component, not an AI system placed on the market; obligations rest with the deployer.
